_note: Rough buildout from mattfryed.com/gyroscopic-illuminated-figure. Copy + credits are Matt's own; images are referenced by URL from his Squarespace CDN (swap to repo/own-host later). Node geometry + colours match the live homepage roster (P-03). Sample-grade structure pending Matt's review.
name: GIF

hero.alt: Gyroscopic Illuminated Figure — neon loading symbol at an angle

intro.title: CLASSIFICATION
intro.body:
Gyroscopic Illuminated Figure (GIF) — an analog spin on the familiar digital loading sequence. It takes a symbol of anticipation, frustration, and promise and extends it indefinitely.

The piece can be set from an excruciatingly slow load, to normal loading-symbol speed, to frenetically fast.

nodes.label: Neon Lightpiece Design
nodes.blurb: Hand-bent neon on a gyroscopic armature — the loading symbol, made physical.

columns.name: Mechanism
columns.body: Gyroscopic armature; rotation speed set on a controller, from a near-stalled crawl to a frantic blur.
